evaluators.name: Cheapest Slope Stability Highway Quote Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user submitted a Denver highway embankment quote for 2025 with budget ≤ $15,000 and selected the cheapest service level that includes slope stability modeling.

evaluators.name: Building CPT & Consolidation Package Plan Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user saved a building foundations investigation plan named 'Headquarters foundation study' using a qualifying CPT + consolidation package under $12,000 and that they chose the cheapest such package.

evaluators.name: Commercial Pile Project Portfolio Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user filtered projects to commercial buildings with pile foundations and opened the detail page of a project with value > $5M.

evaluators.name: Latest Intermediate Retaining Wall Checklist Download Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user filtered to intermediate retaining wall guides/checklists from 2022 onward, sorted by newest first, and downloaded the most recent retaining wall design checklist PDF.

evaluators.name: Foundation Design Consultation Booking Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user booked a 30-minute virtual foundation design consultation in March 2025 starting between 10:00 and 10:30 with contact Alex Martinez and the specified email, using an available slot.

evaluators.name: Bearing Capacity Calculator Save Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user saved a bearing capacity calculation for a 2.0 m wide footing in medium dense sand at 1.5 m depth with FOS=3 under project 'Office Tower A', using the Bearing Capacity Calculator tool.

evaluators.name: Newsletter Subscription Topics & Frequency Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user subscribed 'client.geotech@example.com' with topics slope stability and deep foundations (but not ground improvement), monthly frequency, and consulting engineer role.

evaluators.name: West Region Slope Stability Team Shortlist Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user shortlisted at least three West-region geotechnical staff with ≥10 years' experience and key skills in slope stability or landslide analysis.
